orgPolicy.title: New Variable Cash Award Field in Greenhouse Offer Details
orgPolicy.summary: A new required field 'Are they receiving a % Variable Cash Award?' has been added to offer details in Greenhouse. Recruiters must select the correct option before sending offer letters.
bullets: Options: No - Hourly Candidate / Yes - US Candidate / Yes - Canada Candidate
Variable targets: L1-L3: 5% · L4: 7.5% · L5: 10% of base salary
Program is 50% individual / 50% company performance split
Selecting 'Yes' reveals a field to enter the % number — double-check offer details before sending

tp.point: New GH field for variable cash comp is live — make sure your team is selecting the correct option and double-checking offer details before sending. Incorrect selections affect offer letters.

orgPolicy.title: Greenhouse Onboarding Location Field Updated
orgPolicy.summary: PeopleTech updated the Onboarding Location field in GH offer details so Workday can ingest the data. Only four options are now valid.
bullets: Valid options: Remote, San Francisco, New York, Denver
This data flows directly to Workday and the Onboarding team — accuracy matters
R&D recruiters: ensure onboarding location is accurate on all active offers

tp.point: Onboarding Location field in GH now has four fixed options (Remote, SF, NY, Denver). Remind your team to select the correct one on all offers — this feeds directly into Workday.

orgPolicy.title: Invite Within The Law Resource Page Now Available
orgPolicy.summary: Invite Ops launched a temporary resource page for legal/compliance questions while the full training is being refreshed.
bullets: Available at: https://sites.google.com/gusto.com/invite-academy/invite-within-the-law
Use this as a first stop for any legal or compliance questions that come up in recruiting
Full Invite Within the Law training sessions are currently on pause during refresh

tp.point: New legal/compliance resource is live. Share with your team and remind them to check here before escalating questions.

orgPolicy.title: Greenhouse Expanded Permissions for Invite PEs
orgPolicy.summary: Alli standardized GH permissions across all Invite PEs — new access includes email/social templates, CRM, prospect pools, agency recruiter access, and job creation.
bullets: New access: email/social templates, CRM + prospect pools, agency recruiter access, create jobs (limited scenarios)
Review Laura's full post in #invite-pes for details
Bring questions to PE syncs

tp.point: PEs now have expanded Greenhouse permissions. Worth reviewing what’s newly available for your workflow.

orgPolicy.title: IKB Migrating to Notion
orgPolicy.summary: Invite Ops is doing a full clean-up and rebuild of the Invite Knowledge Base as part of a Notion migration.
bullets: Fixing outdated content, broken links, unclear ownership, and duplicate pages
Goal: one source of truth built around how recruiters and hiring teams actually work
KB Redesign Survey closed June 5 — results will shape new structure
